_nota: Brief artistico per `sad genera <slug>` — mettilo in packs/<slug>/genera.json. Descrizioni in inglese (i modelli rendono meglio).
protagonista: a woman in her late 20s, warm olive skin, long chestnut wavy hair, mustard knit sweater, high-waist jeans, white sneakers, gentle confident posture
secondario: a man in his early 30s, light-medium skin, short dark tidy hair and short beard, teal henley shirt, dark jeans, slightly taller
stanza: cozy winter living room, lit fireplace, red sofa, bookshelf, snowy night outside the window
oggetti: a TV with a folded blanket
a wooden writing desk with a letter
animati: candle flames flicker, fireplace fire dances, snow falls softly outside the window
